---
title: "National Association for Promoting Freedom of Public Worship"
---

## National Association for Promoting Freedom of Public Worship

**Type:** organization

### About

Its full names was the National Association for Promoting Freedom of Public Worship in the Church of England by the Abolition of the Pew System and the General Adoption of the Weekly Offertory.

The President was the Hon. Colin Lindsay;  Robert Brett was one of the Hon. Secretaries.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
